visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a man (Man A) wearing a yellow baseball cap and jersey, with a pink cardboard arrow on his head. He is smiling and waving his hand at the camera in a brightly lit indoor stadium setting. (2) Another man (Man B) wearing glasses and a similar yellow jersey joins him, and they both smile excitedly, with Man B pumping his fist. (3) The scene shifts to the two men holding a large pink sign with text, looking towards each other and then back at the camera. The background shows a crowd of people in the stadium stands. (4) Transition to the stadium concourse where the men are walking and holding plastic bags filled with food items. The camera follows them at a medium distance. (5) Back in the stands, they are seated and showing a "Victory Box" containing various foods like fruits and snacks to the camera, with close-ups of the food items. (6) Man A is then shown wearing a black blindfold while sitting in the stands, holding a food container and trying to eat. Man B is next to him holding a promotional sign. (7) They are later seen holding a pink panda plush toy wearing a miniature yellow jersey, showing its back to the camera while smiling and gesturing. (8) The video concludes with the two men talking enthusiastically to the camera, holding the panda toy and a white cup, with the crowded stadium background behind them.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 主播嘎哥. (2) [Variety]: 熱血主播徐展元. (3) [Slogan]: 阿嘎今天夢眼看球. (4) [Slogan]: 球場內餐廳竟然可以用 foodpanda外帶自取下單 免排隊還享79折. (5) [Slogan]: 直接快速通關. (6) [Slogan]: 外帶自取79折! 買票進來點都划算. (7) [Slogan]: 吃美食順便看球. (8) [Logo]: foodpanda x 中信兄弟. (9) [Slogan]: 必勝飽盒. (10) [Slogan]: 蒙眼看球!. (11) [Slogan]: DOUBLE PLAY. (12) [Slogan]: 使用優惠碼 「美食助攻兄弟」. (13) [Slogan]: 專區下單滿$399享85折 還有機會抽 foodpanda x 中信兄弟聯名應援包. (14) [Slogan]: 兄弟球迷專屬背號 100號. (15) [Slogan]: 指定店家85折啦!. [Subtitle]: 大家好我是今天的這個主播嘎哥 我是徐展元 我們這次呢可以在球場內餐廳竟然可以用foodpanda外帶自取下單免排隊還享79折 直接快速通關 這邊還要排隊喔 這邊就不用排了 外帶自取79折 買票進來點都划算 吃美食順便看球 必勝飽盒 水果 滷味 草莓大福 這顆也是厲害的喔 大家不要緊張 阿嘎今天蒙眼看球 有機會 有全壘打 DOUBLE PLAY 輸入這個美食助攻兄弟在foodpanda App 有機會可以抽到聯名 聯名 超可愛的 它就穿我們兄弟的球衣 而且它的背號 兄弟球迷專屬背號 100號 考試都考一百分 你打開那個App裡面 首頁很清楚就可以看到有我們中信兄弟的一個專區 一樣輸入優惠碼 美食助攻兄弟 真的喔就打中文 真的 美食助攻兄弟 就有85折優惠 感謝這個foodpanda啦 我們的這個美食助攻 全場開轟 大家就點越多 我們就開轟越多 然後就優惠也會多

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main male creators in the foreground, with at least 13 distinct background audience members visible across different clips.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Man A has short dark hair, wearing a yellow Brothers baseball cap and a yellow Brothers jersey over a black shirt. Man B wears glasses and a yellow Brothers jersey over a pink polo shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is the seating area of a large, modern indoor baseball stadium filled with spectators. Some shots are taken in a concrete-walled hallway or concourse area within the stadium.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, excited male voice (Man A) greeting the audience over an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. A digital "whoosh" SFX plays as titles appear. (2) A second male voice (Man B) with a deeper, professional broadcasting timbre introduces himself, accompanied by background crowd cheering and a "ding" sound effect. (3) The voices alternate rapidly, discussing food delivery options with high intensity and volume. Plastic bag rustling and faint ambient stadium noise are audible. (4) During the food review section, the sound of a plastic lid opening is heard, followed by enthusiastic exclamations from both men. (5) A loud surge in crowd cheering and a punchy percussion SFX occur during the "Double Play" shout. (6) The video concludes with the men providing discount codes in a rhythmic, persuasive tone, ending with a final burst of high-energy BGM and audience murmur.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy promotional collaboration between foodpanda and the CTBC Brothers baseball team. It aims to showcase the convenience of using foodpanda's pick-up service at the stadium to avoid queues and obtain discounts, while also promoting a special collaborative food box and merchandise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of foodpanda signs, use of the foodpanda app, mention of specific discount codes, and promotion of co-branded products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media marketing video featuring popular Taiwanese creators and professional sports branding. The technical audio-visual synchronization is tight, designed for mobile consumption.
